title: whats the current meta for roaming?

turns.userText: whats the current meta for roaming?
turns.agentText:
**Evoker and Conduit lead the June 2026 roaming meta**, with several post-expansion specs dominating the top tier.

## Meta (Tier 1)

| Build | Role | Rating |
|---|---|---|
| **Conduit** (Revenant) — Condition Mallyx | Condi DPS / Sustain | 5 |
| **Conduit** (Revenant) — Power Shiro | Power DPS | 5 |
| **Daredevil** (Thief) — Power S/D | Power DPS | 5 |
| **Deadeye** (Thief) — SA Rifle | Power DPS / Sustain | 5 |
| **Evoker** (Elementalist) — Celestial D/D "Toad" | Hybrid Bruiser | 5 |
| **Evoker** (Elementalist) — Scepter "Harevoker" | Hybrid Bruiser | 5 |
| **Ritualist** (Necromancer) — Blood Power | Power DPS | 5 |
| **Virtuoso** (Mesmer) — Power Speartuoso | Power DPS | 4.5 |

**Key takeaways:**

- **Evoker** is the standout new spec — D/D "Toad" and Scepter "Harevoker" both hit Meta 5, with a third Great 5 Spear variant. Strong all-rounder.
- **Conduit** (Revenant) is the other new powerhouse — Mallyx/Jalis legend-swap for condition sustain, or Shiro for burst. Both Meta 5.
- **Ritualist** (Necromancer) is another post-expansion spec punching hard in Meta tier.
- **Thief** remains excellent with two Meta-5 builds (Daredevil S/D, SA Rifle Deadeye).

## Great Tier Highlights

**Engineer** has the widest roster — Amalgam, Holosmith Tools, Scrapper Explosive Hammer, and Scrapper Superspeed Grenadier all sit at Great 5. Strongest overall class breadth.

**Harbinger** offers two Great 5 builds (Celestial Elixir and Spear Vampbringer) for a sustain-heavy necro playstyle.

**Luminary** (Guardian) brings a new Radiant GS variant at Great 5 as well.

## Gear Trends

- **Celestial** dominates Great/Good tiers — self-sufficient sustain is the roaming norm.
- **Trailblazer** for Condition Mallyx Conduit (native Resistance sustain negates the stat tax).
- **Shadow Arts** builds (Deadeye, some Daredevil) run more aggressive stats thanks to passive sustain from the trait line.

Want me to pull a specific build in detail, or compare a couple of options for a profession you play?
